---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for AirEye-Cluster
title: "[component]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Component

<!-- Which platform component does this affect? -->

## Use Case

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits? -->

## Operational Impact

<!-- How does this change affect sync waves, resource requirements, bootstrap order, or existing workloads? -->

## Security and Privacy Impact

<!-- Does this introduce new secret paths, change authentication flows, or expose new endpoints? -->

## Infrastructure Checklist

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Requires new secrets in Vault
- [ ] Requires new TLS certificate or DNS entry
- [ ] Requires new public ingress
- [ ] Requires new storage (PVC or MinIO bucket)
- [ ] Requires new provider API keys (LiteLLM)
- [ ] Changes existing sync wave assignments
